comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Feature: Agent-invoked issue focus

Scenario: Agent focuses a specific issue
  Given the agent is using the CLI
  And I am viewing the board
  When the agent requests focus for a specific issue id
  Then the board receives a focus message for that issue
  And the UI highlights or focuses that issue card

Scenario: CLI focus command exists
  Given I want to focus an issue
  When I run a CLI command with the issue id
  Then the server receives a focus request
  And a focus event is broadcast to the board via SSE
